name: BLOCK FUSION
description: Place block shapes on the grid and fill complete rows or columns to clear them! Chain multiple clears for massive combo multipliers. Inspired by the #1 puzzle game trend of 2025, Block Fusion brings satisfying block-placing gameplay with beautiful visuals and combo mechanics. 10 levels with increasing grid sizes (8x8 to 10x10), more colors, and higher score targets. Features: drag-and-drop placement with ghost preview, combo chain system with screen shake and particle effects, 6 vibrant colors, progressive difficulty, 3 lives, auto-save, and original chiptune BGM. Simple to play, deeply satisfying to master!
instructions: Drag blocks from the tray to the grid or press 1-2-3 to select a piece then click the grid to place Fill complete rows or columns to clear them Chain clears for combo multipliers All 3 pieces must be placed before new ones appear
